notes: Austria are largely at full strength with Florian Grillitsch and Patrick Wimmer listed as doubts to start, while tournament absentee Christoph Baumgartner (thigh) is ruled out of the whole competition; Jordan are without influential striker Yazan Al Naimat (knee, Arab Cup injury) and late call-up Ibrahim Sabra (injury), though captain Ehsan Haddad is fit after returning from a lengthy spell on the sidelines.
home_scorers: Marko Arnautovic (all-time Austria top scorer, focal point of attack)
Marcel Sabitzer (dynamic box-to-box midfielder, goal threat from distance)
Michael Gregoritsch (wide forward, clinical finisher, set-piece threat)
away_scorers: Mousa Al Tamari (talisman winger, 7 international goals this season, main attack
Ali Olwan (leading striker, expected to lead the line per predicted XI)
Odeh Fakhoury (attacking midfielder, creative force in Jordan's front line)
